product_overview: A sports management web app for organizing youth academy operations across roster management, athlete evaluation, training sessions, and match tracking. Coaches can monitor squad metrics, update player status, and manage activity plans from a central dashboard.
core_goals: View key academy metrics and navigate to core workflows quickly
Search, filter, and register athletes in the roster
Inspect individual athlete profiles and update their status
Evaluate athlete performance across technical, tactical, physical, and behavioral dimensions
Create training sessions and track athlete attendance
Schedule matches and review match details and tactical information

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Lets users review academy KPIs, see upcoming activity details, and jump into the main management areas.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the dashboard metrics and upcoming activity summaries -> Open a quick-action option to access a core management area
Navigate to / -> Read the upcoming training or match details -> Choose to manage the highlighted activity

features.name: Squad Roster and Registration
features.description: Lets users search, filter, and add athletes to the academy roster, then open an athlete profile for deeper details.
user_flows: Navigate to /atletas -> View the roster grouped by category -> Type a name to narrow the list -> Filter athletes by category or status -> Open an athlete profile from the list
Navigate to /atletas -> Open the new athlete registration flow -> Enter athlete details -> Save the new athlete -> See the updated roster list

features.name: Athlete Profile and Status
features.description: Lets users inspect an athlete’s personal and physical details, review progress history, and change the athlete’s status.
user_flows: Navigate to /atletas -> Open an athlete profile from the roster -> View personal details, physical characteristics, and performance charts -> Review the history of recorded progress
Navigate to /atletas -> Open an athlete profile from the roster -> Select a new status for the athlete -> Observe the updated status in the profile

features.name: Athlete Evaluative Scoring
features.description: Lets coaches evaluate an athlete using structured scores and comments across multiple performance dimensions.
user_flows: Navigate to /avaliar -> Select the athlete’s age category -> Choose an athlete from the roster -> Set technical, tactical, physical, and behavioral scores -> Add comments -> Save the evaluation

Navigate to /avaliar -> Select the athlete’s age category -> Choose an athlete from the roster -> Leave one or more scoring inputs incomplete or invalid -> See the form prevent saving until the evaluation is completed

features.name: Training Schedule and Attendance
features.description: Lets users create training sessions, review the training list, and mark athlete attendance in a session.
user_flows: Navigate to /treinos -> Browse upcoming and past training sessions -> Open the new training flow -> Enter training details -> Submit the session -> See it added to the training list
Navigate to /treinos -> Open a training session from the list -> Review the participant list -> Toggle attendance for athletes -> See the attendance status update in the session details

features.name: Match and Tactical Control
features.description: Lets users create matches, review match information, and manage match status and tactical setup.
user_flows: Navigate to /jogos -> Review scheduled and completed matches -> Open the new match flow -> Enter match details -> Submit the match -> See it appear in the match list
Navigate to /jogos -> Open a match from the list -> View match stats and tactical board -> Update the game status -> Observe the match details reflect the change

tech_stack: Tailwind CSS, Supabase, Lucide React, Recharts

routes.description: Dashboard page showing sports management metrics, upcoming activity details, quick navigation cards, and squad evolution summaries.
Roster management page for Sub-15 and Sub-17 categories, allowing name search, filtering by status, and adding new athletes.
Profile page for a specific athlete containing personal details, physical characteristics, performance history, status update tools, and metrics charts.
Evaluation sheet page where coaches rate athlete technical, tactical, physical, and behavioral metrics.
Training planning page with scheduling features, athlete list check-in/attendance tracking, and session feedback.
Match management page showing scheduled/completed games, opponent details, tactical board, and match stats.

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Displays primary KPIs like total athletes, medical status, scheduled sessions, and quick navigation menu.
user_interactions: View the metrics dashboard cards
Click on quick-action menu items to go to evaluate, roster, training, or matches
Read upcoming training/match details card and click "Gerenciar"

features.name: Squad Roster and Registration
features.description: List, filter, search, and add new athletes to the academy roster.
user_interactions: Type search terms in the search bar
Filter roster by category or status
Click "Novo Atleta" button to open registration modal
Fill athlete registration form and click save
Click an athlete card to view their profile details

features.name: Athlete Profile and Status
features.description: Detailed athlete specs including metrics logs, status adjustment, and visual evolution graphs.
user_interactions: View detailed physical statistics and contact information
Select a new status from the status dropdown menu
View historical progress logs

features.name: Athlete Evaluative Scoring
features.description: Evaluate technical, tactical, physical, and behavioral scores for an athlete.
user_interactions: Select age category filter
Select an athlete from the roster dropdown
Use sliders to set grades (1-10) for technical, tactical, physical, and behavioral criteria
Add evaluation comments in text area
Click "Salvar Avaliação" to store performance results

features.name: Training Schedule and Attendance
features.description: Schedule new training sessions and take athlete attendance checklist.
user_interactions: Browse upcoming and past trainings list
Click "Novo Treino" to open training creator modal
Fill training metadata and submit
Click on a training card to open details and toggle attendance checkmarks for each player

features.name: Match and Tactical Control
features.description: Schedule matches, update outcomes/scores, and adjust tactical lineup positions.
user_interactions: Review match schedules and scores
Click "Novo Jogo" to open match registration form
Click on a match to view stats details, lineup chalkboard, and update game status
